text:
ANTPSYCT_TKNG_ADMSN_CD ANTPSYCT_TKNG_ADMSN_CD High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Antipsychotic (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was taking any medications by pharmacological classification, not how it is used, 
from the antipsychotic class. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
